title: capsella brevisiliqua
intro: Capsella brevisiliqua, also known as small-celled shepard's purse, is a plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. It has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Capsella brevisiliqua include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps and heavy bleeding, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Capsella brevisiliqua can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
